steps.title: Use the colon clue
steps.content: The explanation after the colon says wave power varies in unpredictable ways. The blank must describe the quality wave power lacks: steadiness or reliability for planning electricity generation.

steps.title: Eliminate unrelated meanings
steps.content: Choice A is about chance, Choice B is about assurance, and Choice C is about cost. The text is about unpredictable variation in wave power. The answer is D.
